Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Maxwell]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Maxwell is a leader who wears black pants and a black shirt with a white rose in his pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Maxwell was killed in a pool of his own blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Maxwell taught Shera never to sleep without a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Maxwell ambushes his trainees in their sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Maxwell was a figure under whom Shera cleaned the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Maxwell would have told Shera she wasted precious seconds by leaving the man alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Maxwell used attacks that conditioned Shera to be hyper-alert.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Maxwell dresses the trainees for their missions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Maxwell uses punishments on those he calls 'insubordinate' or 'unruly'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Maxwell told Shera to think like them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Shera killed Maxwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Maxwell taught the students to rest when they could.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Maxwell is a character who holds a smoking gun over Mari’s corpse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Maxwell taught Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Maxwell told Shera that there is no such thing as mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Shera wonders if Maxwell took something broken inside her.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Maxwell has conducted ambushes against Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Jorin's attacker and Shera trained under Maxwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Maxwell has ideas regarding disguises.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Maxwell once spoke regarding scam artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Maxwell is a person whose words Shera recalls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Maxwell taught Shera that home is where you are most vulnerable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Maxwell once said that family is the root of all insanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Maxwell took Shera in after she had been kidnapping/begging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Maxwell's killers have surfaced recently.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Maxwell is a person who once gave Shera advice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Maxwell trained assassins including Benji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Maxwell was an insane revolutionary who grilled pork chops.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Maxwell gave instructions on when to kill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Maxwell used a whistle to call his children-in-training.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Maxwell trained imitation Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Maxwell trained pseudo-Gardeners before they were stolen by the Magisters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Maxwell taught Shera that one should never trust a mission that is too easy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Maxwell's blood sprayed from Shera's knife in a memory.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
